summary: BUG FIX VERIFIED: Assignment student links 'no online questions' bug - Both fixes confirmed working. 1) Google Classroom share button now only shows for assignments WITH questions/attachments. 2) Edit button opens full dialog pre-populated with existing data including questions, with 'Update Assignment' button for PUT request.

minor.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <th>/<tbody>/<tr>/<td> - doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Gradebook.js lines 1373-1403: Share buttons correctly conditional on `assignment.questions?.length > 0 || assignment.attachments?.length > 0`
Gradebook.js lines 260-272: handleOpenEditDialog correctly populates form fields, questions array, and attachments array from existing assignment
Gradebook.js line 805: Dialog title correctly shows 'Edit Assignment' when editingAssignmentId is set
Gradebook.js lines 210-222: handleCreateAssignment correctly uses PUT for updates when editingAssignmentId exists
server.py lines 2062-2076: PUT /api/assignments/{assignment_id} endpoint properly updates all fields including questions and attachments
seed_data_creation: Test assignments created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Assignment edit/share bug fix verified. Gradebook page at /gradebook shows View Assignments dialog with correct conditional buttons. Known test tokens: '2ae35432d130' (3 questions), '348d67436aaa' (0 questions/PDF only). Student page at /assignment/{token} works for both cases.

PUT /api/assignments/{id} - Update assig.details: Created assignment without questions, then updated via PUT to add questions - questions persisted correctly

Gradebook page loads.details: Page loads with category cards, grade entry table, AI Assignments section

View Assignments dialog.details: Shows both AI Assignments and Manual Assignments with correct action buttons

Share buttons conditional on questions/a.details: Assignment 'Test Assignment for Edit' (no questions) shows only Edit/Delete. Assignments with questions show Print/Copy Link/Google Classroom buttons

Edit button opens pre-populated dialog.details: Edit dialog shows 'Edit Assignment' title, title pre-populated with 'Test Assignment for Edit', category 'Tarea' selected, points 100, Build Questions tab available

Student page with questions (2ae35432d13.details: Shows 3 questions with proper UI: multiple choice, true/false, short answer. Name/email inputs and Submit button visible

Student page with 0 questions (348d67436.details: Shows helpful message: 'This assignment has no online questions yet. Please check back later or contact your teacher.'

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Assignment student links show 'no online questions' because: 1) Google Classroom share was showing for assignments without questions. 2) No way to edit existing assignment to add questions.
fix_applied: 1. Share buttons (Google Classroom, Copy Link) now conditional: only render when `assignment.questions?.length > 0 || assignment.attachments?.length > 0`
2. handleOpenEditDialog function populates form state (title, category, points, due_date, description), questions array, and attachments array
3. Dialog title shows 'Edit Assignment' in edit mode via `editingAssignmentId` state check
4. Submit button shows 'Update Assignment' in edit mode
5. handleCreateAssignment uses PUT request when editingAssignmentId is set
test_evidence: Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed including create-then-update flow
Frontend: Screenshot shows 'Test Assignment for Edit' with only Edit/Delete buttons (no share)
Frontend: Screenshot shows assignments with questions have full button set
Frontend: Edit dialog screenshot shows pre-populated fields and 'Update Assignment' button
Student page: Token 2ae35432d130 shows 3 questions correctly
Student page: Token 348d67436aaa shows 'no online questions' message
